title: teramnus axilliflorus
intro: Teramnus axilliflorus, also known as Cat's claw or Desmodium, is a perennial climbing plant native to tropical Africa and Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Its health benefits are attributed to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and protect against oxidative stress. Teramnus axilliflorus is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or extract, and is traditionally used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
